patchouli.mengsamanetmusic.title: MengSama Net Music: Playlist Manual
patchouli.mengsamanetmusic.description: Introduction to MengSama Net Music: Playlist
patchouli.mengsamanetmusic.play_list.add: Put the playlist item into the CD burner/computer, the mod has been adapted for direct burning. $(br)(If songs are overwritten, see the next chapter)$(br)Use the list/ prefix to burn NetEase playlists.
Hold the playlist item and click to open an interface, click the options in the list to select songs. $(br)If 'Add Song' is selected, the burned song will be appended to the playlist, otherwise it will overwrite the current song. $(br)You can switch play modes, delete and move songs in this interface.
patchouli.mengsamanetmusic.play_list_use: Just put it in the music player. (Note: not the vanilla jukebox)
Using MengSama Net Music without a portable player is like using PS only for green screen removal

Prepare a CD or playlist with content (playlists cannot be in append mode), pick it up in your inventory, and left-click the player to insert it for playback, right-click the player to take out the internal CD/playlist. $(br)When containing an item, the player will display the current song info in the item tooltip.

While the portable player is playing music, right-click to open the quick song select menu (on the right side of the screen), use the scroll wheel to select songs, and use it again to switch songs. $(br)Hold the speed-up key (default Left Shift) to accelerate scrolling, hold the translation key (default Left Alt) to show translated song names. $(br2)Red songs are VIP songs and currently cannot be played.
The portable player displays song info in the upper left corner while playing music, including song cover, name, translation, playback progress and lyrics.
patchouli.mengsamanetmusic.ender_player_: The Ender Music Player works similarly to the MengSama Net Music player. $(br)Right-click to add or remove yourself from the whitelist. $(br)If the whitelist is empty, it will play music to all nearby players regardless of distance. (Must be in view)$(br)Otherwise, it will only play music to whitelisted players.
